calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Darrin Ng for Elva Marchi (Petitioner).

The Court stated that this is a spousal property petition where it doesn't seem like it will effect distribution of the property and asked if the property had been distributed under the joint tenancy provision. Mr. Ng stated that the property has not been distributed under the joint tenancy provision, that no one is here to object, that the only purpose of this is for a step up in tax basis and that they are trying to confirm that the property was community property. The Court questions why it should be involved in a decision that may or may not happen with the Internal Revenue Service ("IRS)", that they can take that issue up with the IRS if and when something happens, that the Court should not be involved for the purpose of characterization of a property and provided an example of when the use of a spousal property petition is appropriate. The Petition for Spousal Property is denied.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Chu. Not reported.
